field.tagline: Solar panels + crops on shared land

garden.tagline: Companion planting in a small plot

step1.title: Define Your Garden
step1.subtitle: Enter the size of your garden bed in meters (up to 20 × 20).
step1.hint: Plants are packed as circles by their mature spread — companions cluster together, antagonists are kept apart.

step1.title: Define Your Field
step1.subtitle: Enter the dimensions of your field in meters.

step2.title: Choose Your Plants
step2.subtitle: Select the plants you want to grow. Companion plants are grouped together automatically.
step2.error: Could not load plants. Is the server running?

step3.title: Solar Integration
step3.subtitle: Configure your agrivoltaic system. The allowed range is based on your field size.

generating.title: Generating field layout…
generating.subtitle: Large fields can take up to 5 minutes.
generating.lost_connection: Lost connection while generating layout — please try again.

summary.title: Your Agrivoltaic Garden
summary.subtitle: Hover over rows and plant groups to explore your field layout.
summary.error: Could not generate layout. Please go back and try again.
summary.threed_locked: 3D view is available once the garden is ready
